message:
fix(fj-lax): handle empty spatial dimensions in Conv SAME padding

Conv SAME padding computed `(out - 1) * stride + kernel_size` which
underflows when input_size=0 produces out=0 from div_ceil(stride).

Changes:
- Add early return (0, 0) for input_size=0 in compute_output_and_pad
- Add early return (0, 0) for width=0 in 1D conv SAME padding path
- Add 5 regression tests for empty width/height in 1D and 2D conv

Fixes: frankenjax-zk6q

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
